assertions.description: The design powers a 12V LED strip (via AL8843 boost/LED driver from VBUS), provides +12V via NCP1117-12 LDO, and +3V3 via NCP1117-3.3 LDO. All three regulators are correctly detected with their topologies (switching vs LDO), inductor association (L1 with U2), input rail (VBUS), and output rails. The STM32F030F4Px microcontroller (U7) and DRV8231 motor driver (U8) are also identified.
